STIPULATION TO MEDIATE IN LIEU OF ARBITRATION FILED BY NATHAN-NWIHIM, ROSEMARY

PLAINTIFF ROSEMARY NATHAN-NWIHIM'S MOTION TO MEDIATE IN LIEU OF ARBITRATION IS SCHEDULED THIS DAY. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE NOR AN OBJECTION TENTATIVE RULING TO GRANT MOTION IS ADOPTED. MOTION IS ORDERED GRANTED. CASE IS ORDERED REMOVED FROM JUDICIAL ARBITRATION. ORDER SIGNED. COURT ORDERED CASE SCHEDULED FOR JURY TRIAL ON 1/12/2009 AT 9:30 AM, IN DEPARTMENT 206. COURT TO GIVE NOTICE OF THE TRIAL DATE AND MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. COURT ORDERED A MEDIATION ENFORCEMENT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET ON 10/22/2008 AT 10:00 AM, IN DEPARTMENT 212. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (212)

Ntc Of Mtn And Unopposed Mtn To Mediate In Lieu Of Arbitration
Off Calendar Jul-03-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Rosemary Nathan-Nwihim's Motion to Mediate in Lieu of Arbitration is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Case is ordered removed from Judicial Arbitration. Order signed. Court ordered case scheduled for Jury Trial on 1/12/2009 at 9:30 AM, in Department 206. Court to give notice of the Trial Date and Mandatory Settlement Conference. Court ordered a Mediation Enforcement Order to Show Cause set on 10/22/2008 at 10:00 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings not reported. (212)
